source_note: Official NMRC per-station timing table at nmrcnoida.com blocks automated access (robots.txt). Values below are aggregated from third-party metro information sites and should be verified against the official source for precision.

operating_hours.notes: Some sources list last train as 22:45 on certain routes/days; official confirmation recommended.

interchange.note: Skywalk between NMRC Sector 51 and DMRC Sector 52 reported as not yet operational

ticketing_note: Delhi Metro smart cards are NOT valid on Aqua Line. Requires separate NMRC CITY1 smart card or QR ticket.
